reviewer_verdict: The reviewer recommends this as the only consumer smart lock holding both ANSI Grade 1 commercial and BHMA AAA residential security certifications, citing independently tested 99%+ Apple Home Key reliability, over the Level Lock Pro (weaker single-battery motor, roughly 10% Home Key failure rate) and Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus (lower Grade 2 certification), while flagging the lack of Matter/Thread support and a split mechanical/electronic warranty as tradeoffs.

planet.gap_note: No environmental-impact information was provided for this product; ClearCart must source this independently.

people_supply_chain.gap_note: No labor or supply-chain sourcing information was given for this product.

claims.claim: Only consumer smart lock certified to both ANSI Grade 1 (commercial) and BHMA AAA (highest residential) standards, built to survive 250,000 open-close cycles and 10 consecutive 75 ft-lb ramming blows
Apple Home Key achieves over 99% first-attempt reliability across six months of independent testing by Power Moves blog, versus roughly 10% failure rate for the competing Level Lock Pro
Reviewer rejected the Yale Assure Lock 2 Plus for dropping to the lower BHMA Grade 2 certification, meaning measurably less resistance to forced entry
At roughly $280 backed by a lifetime mechanical warranty, the reviewer calculates a cost of about $28/year over a decade
Schlage discloses that the lifetime warranty covers only the mechanical lock body, with electronic components carrying a separate 3-year warranty — a distinction the reviewer notes most buyers miss

notable_signals: Cites a specific, named third-party reliability study (Power Moves blog, six-month Apple Home Key testing) with a quantified failure-rate comparison across competing smart locks.
Flags a disclosed-but-easy-to-miss warranty structure (lifetime mechanical vs. 3-year electronic) as a transparency positive, distinct from marketing claims.

attribution.reviewer: Clarity Insight Advisory (Buy Better With Brian)
attribution.note: Assessment derived from this reviewer's published work; see review_url for their full analysis.
